reviews.review_description:
Developer are you going to fix???!!??


Cool potential! I like trying new games and giving feedback.

But….

The graphics need optimisation badly.

Boxes are blurry and the edges of things aren’t smooth eg table and shelves and edges are constantly jagging and moving around .  

I dropped a piece on the floor and it was very hard to pick up! 

Things bounce and move on table one pice go stuck inside under table.

The blue print should have option to lighten or darken very hard to see where things go.

Some parts are so small have no idea what they were, we should be able to resize all parts up and down before placing to look at them.

I did the Jeep Willy and cleared Both 1 and 2 only to either be missing something or didn’t know what to do  next I try putting on shelves I look for more parts but have no idea what to do next was not able to save or finish model.

But get these small issues fixed and it would be amazing 

Also a tank like tiger would be great to have

Iam on quest 3
